slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Very dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top: bold red #E63946 stripe full width with COMPACT white text 'HEAD TRAUMA 긴급 가이드'. Top-right below stripe: '소아과언니' white Pretendard SemiBold small, no quotes, no decoration. Headline COMPACT 25% smaller: '머리 부딪힘' white bold, '응급 대처법' bright red #E63946. Small white subtitle: 'PECARN 기준 · CDC 가이드라인'. LARGE prominent line illustration child head profile with bandage and medical cross symbol, white outline on dark background, minimal clean strokes. Bottom-left small gray: 'PARENTING NOTE · 011'. No pixel values as text on card. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes, no decoration. Top-left bright red rounded label: '즉시 응급실 ⚠️'. Headline COMPACT 25% smaller: '이런 증상이면' white bold, '바로 119' bright red #E63946. Center: SMALL LINE ILLUSTRATION emergency phone icon red glow. Below: red outlined box with comfortable padding, 5 rows stacked vertically with GENEROUS spacing. Each row: SMALL red cross icon left + COMPACT white text right: '의식 잃음 · 반응 없음' / '멈추지 않는 구토 반복' / '극심한 두통 호소' / '경련·발작 발생' / '잠만 자려고 함'. Box glowing red border effect. No pixel values as text. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes. Top-left red rounded label: '특히 주의 ⚠️'. Headline COMPACT: '영아는' white, '더 취약합니다' red #E63946. Center: LARGE LINE ILLUSTRATION baby head side view with skull outline visible, white clean strokes on dark. Below: dark card #1A2B3C rounded, GENEROUS padding. Two sections stacked: mint '2세 미만 영아' bold + white text '옆머리·뒷머리 큰 혹 → 병원 진료' with SMALL baby icon / red '3개월 미만' bold + white text '경미한 손상도 주의깊은 관찰 필수' with SMALL warning icon. GENEROUS spacing between sections. Bottom thin red divider. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes. Top-left mint rounded label: '즉각 행동 ✓'. Headline COMPACT: '부딪힌 직후' white, '이렇게 하세요' mint #2EC4B6. Center area: 3 rows stacked with GENEROUS vertical spacing. Row 1: SMALL LINE ILLUSTRATION ice pack icon left (mint ✓ overlay) + COMPACT white text right '깨끗한 천으로 10분 이상 지혈 · 얼음찜질로 부기 감소'. Row 2: SMALL stabilization icon left (mint ✓) + white text '안정된 자세로 눕히기'. Row 3: SMALL neck brace icon left (mint ✓) + white text '머리·목 함께 고정 (목 손상 가능성 고려)'. Mint outlined box around all rows with comfortable padding. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes. Top-left mint rounded label: '집 관찰 가능 ✓'. Headline COMPACT: '이 상태면' white, '집에서 지켜봐요' mint #2EC4B6. Center: LARGE LINE ILLUSTRATION peaceful sleeping child icon mint outline. Below: dark card #1A2B3C rounded GENEROUS padding. Two sections: mint '✓ 의식 명료' bold + white text '정상적으로 행동 · 증상 없음 (PECARN 기준)' / mint '✓ 24시간 관찰' bold + white text '의식·구토·행동 변화 주의깊게 확인'. SMALL checklist icon top-right of card. Bottom: white text 'Source: PECARN clinical decision rule'. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes. Top-left red rounded label: '병원 관찰 기준'. Headline COMPACT: '병원에서' white, '지켜봐야 할 때' red #E63946. Center: SMALL LINE ILLUSTRATION hospital building icon white. Below: red outlined box GENEROUS padding. Large red '4-6시간' bold center with small white '손상 시점부터' above. White text below: '증상 악화 여부 확인 후 퇴원 결정'. Horizontal thin white divider. Small white text: '대부분의 두개내 출혈은 6시간 이내 발견 · 이후 증상 없으면 안전 귀가'. SMALL clock icon bottom-right. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes. Top-left red rounded label: 'CT 촬영 기준'. Headline COMPACT: 'CT는' white, '꼭 필요할 때만' red #E63946. Center: LARGE LINE ILLUSTRATION CT scan machine icon white outline minimal. Below: dark card #1A2B3C rounded GENEROUS padding. Red '⚠️ 방사선 노출' bold + white text '불필요한 CT 최소화'. Thin divider. Mint '✓ PECARN 기준' bold + white text '위험도 평가로 중요한 뇌손상 놓치지 않으면서 CT 줄임'. Two small icons: radiation warning left, checklist right. Bottom white small: 'Source: CDC Guideline 2018'. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes. Top-left red rounded label: '재방문 신호 ⚠️'. Headline COMPACT: '집에서 관찰 중' white, '이러면 다시 응급실' red #E63946. Center: SMALL LINE ILLUSTRATION warning bell icon red glow. Below: red outlined box GENEROUS padding. 3 rows stacked GENEROUS spacing: Row 1 red '!' icon + white text '증상 악화 또는 새로운 신경학적 증상'. Row 2 red '!' icon + white text '보호자가 평가 어려운 상태'. Row 3 red '!' icon + white text '신뢰할 수 없는 관찰 환경'. Bottom small white: '즉시 응급실 재방문 필요'. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy #0D1B2A. VERY GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes, no decoration. Top-center small gray: 'SAVE & SHARE'. Headline COMPACT 25% smaller center: '오늘 확인하고' white bold, '저장하세요' mint #2EC4B6 with thin mint underline. Source box dark #1A2B3C rounded GENEROUS padding: white small bold '출처' + 4 lines white small '· The Lancet PECARN Study 2009' / '· CDC mTBI Guideline JAMA Pediatrics 2018' / '· Canadian Paediatric Society 2024' / '· UpToDate Clinical Resource 2024'. Thin white horizontal divider. Center: '소아과언니' white bold large, NO quotes, NO decoration. Below: 'DR.SOA UNNIE · 소아청소년과 전문의' gray small. Thin white divider. '@dr.soa_unnie · 매주 새 가이드' white. Bottom: '소아과수첩 앱 · 야간 달빛병원 바로 찾기' mint. No pixel values anywhere. No quotes anywhere.

common_style:
# 경고·긴급 톤 — 검증된 prompt 패턴

## 공통 규칙 (전 슬라이드)
- 배경: 짙은 네이비 #0D1B2A
- 텍스트: 흰색 #FFFFFF
- 긴급 강조: bright red #E63946
- 안전/긍정: mint #2EC4B6
- 카드 배경: #1A2B3C
- GENEROUS outer margin 모든 슬라이드
- 텍스트 크기 25% 작게
- 슬라이드마다 아이콘/일러스트 필수
- 시그니쳐: 우상단 소아과언니 white (따옴표 없이 4글자만)

## COVER 패턴 (slide n:1)
Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Very dark navy background #0D1B2A.
GENEROUS outer margin all sides.
Top: bold red #E63946 stripe full width + COMPACT white text '[토픽] 긴급 가이드'.
Top-right below stripe: '소아과언니' white Pretendard SemiBold small, no quotes.
Headline COMPACT (25% smaller): '[첫 줄]' white bold, '[핵심 긴급 표현]' bright red #E63946.
Small white subtitle: '[부제] · AAP 가이드라인 기준'.
LARGE prominent line illustration [토픽 관련 응급 장면] white outline on dark background.
Bottom-left small gray: 'PARENTING NOTE · [번호]'.
No pixel values. No quotes.

## 금지 항목 패턴 (❌ 슬라이드)
Dark navy background.
Top-left red rounded label: '절대 하지 마세요 ❌'.
Headline COMPACT: '[내용]' white, '[핵심]' red.
Rows stacked: SMALL LINE ILLUSTRATION ICON left (red ❌ overlay) + COMPACT white text right.
Red outlined box around all rows, comfortable padding.
No pixel values.

## 행동 항목 패턴 (✓ 슬라이드)
Dark navy background.
Top-left mint rounded label: '[행동] ✓'.
Headline COMPACT: '[내용]' white, '[핵심]' mint #2EC4B6.
Rows stacked: SMALL ICON left (mint ✓ overlay) + COMPACT white text right, GENEROUS spacing.
Mint outlined box around all rows.
No pixel values.

## 119 패턴
Full-width bright red header bar + white bold '[긴급 행동]'.
LARGE relevant illustration center (구급차/응급 아이콘).
Numbered items: red number + white text, GENEROUS spacing.
Large red rounded border around items.

## OUTRO 패턴 (slide n:9)
Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy #0D1B2A.
VERY GENEROUS outer margin.
Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes.
Top-center small gray: 'SAVE & SHARE'.
Headline COMPACT: '오늘 확인하고 저장하세요' white, '저장하세요' mint underline.
Source box dark #1A2B3C rounded GENEROUS padding.
출처 (white small bold)
· [출처 1]
· [출처 2]
Thin white divider.
소아과언니 white bold large center (NO quotes).
DR.SOA UNNIE · 소아청소년과 전문의 gray.
Thin divider.
@dr.soa_unnie · 매주 새 가이드 white.
소아과수첩 앱 · [CTA] mint.
No pixel values. No quotes.
